content.query:
-- apply xd rules to labclaim
-- drop table [appl].[deid_ino_control_labclaim_t];
-- alter schema appl transfer customer.stg_ino_control_labclaim_t;
-- rename object appl.stg_ino_control_labclaim_t to deid_ino_control_labclaim_t;

-- drop table [appl].[deid_ino_treatment_labclaim_t];
-- alter schema appl transfer customer.stg_ino_treatment_labclaim_t;
-- rename object appl.stg_ino_treatment_labclaim_t to deid_ino_treatment_labclaim_t;


--redact hcpcs procedure codes
update c
set c.[hcpcscode] = ''
from [appl].[deid_ino_control_labclaim_t] c
    inner join 
    (
        select code from [dim].[hcpcs_2024_sensitive_codes_t] 
        union 
        select code from [dim].[cpt_sensitive_codes_t]
    ) h
        on c.[hcpcscode] = h.code;
GO

--redact LOINC codes
update c
set c.[loinccode] = ''
from [appl].[deid_ino_control_labclaim_t] c
    inner join [dim].[loinc_code_t] l
        on c.[loinccode] = l.code;
GO

--redact hcpcs procedure codes
update c
set c.[hcpcscode] = ''
from [appl].[deid_ino_treatment_labclaim_t] c
    inner join 
    (
        select code from [dim].[hcpcs_2024_sensitive_codes_t] 
        union 
        select code from [dim].[cpt_sensitive_codes_t]
    ) h
        on c.[hcpcscode] = h.code;
GO

--redact LOINC codes
update c
set c.[loinccode] = ''
from [appl].[deid_ino_treatment_labclaim_t] c
    inner join [dim].[loinc_code_t] l
        on c.[loinccode] = l.code;
GO

-- apply xd rules to provider
-- drop table [appl].[deid_ino_control_provider_t];
-- alter schema appl transfer customer.stg_ino_control_provider_t;
-- rename object appl.stg_ino_control_provider_t to deid_ino_control_provider_t;

-- drop table [appl].[deid_ino_treatment_provider_t];
-- alter schema appl transfer customer.stg_ino_treatment_provider_t;
-- rename object appl.stg_ino_treatment_provider_t to deid_ino_treatment_provider_t;

--redact provider taxonomy
update c
set c.[taxonomycode] = pt.recode,
	c.taxonomytype = pt.recode_type,
	c.taxonomyclassification = pt.recode_classification,
	c.taxonomyspecialization = pt.recode_specialization
from [appl].[deid_ino_control_provider_t] c
    inner join [dim].[provider_taxonomy_t] pt
        on c.[taxonomycode] = pt.code;
GO

--redact provider taxonomy
update c
set c.[taxonomycode] = pt.recode,
	c.taxonomytype = pt.recode_type,
	c.taxonomyclassification = pt.recode_classification,
	c.taxonomyspecialization = pt.recode_specialization
from [appl].[deid_ino_treatment_provider_t] c
    inner join [dim].[provider_taxonomy_t] pt
        on c.[taxonomycode] = pt.code;
GO
